name: Shenzhen Chengxin Lithium Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Chengxin Lithium Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells fiberboard products in China. The company provides medium (high) density fiberboards used in furniture, door, and reinforcement Wood flooring, and decoration industries. It is also involved in forest planting and sales activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
